base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_life_hearts — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. Life-readout heart states: empty / half / full. Rendered in row of 8-16 hearts per max-HP. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Life-readout heart states: empty / half / full. Rendered in row of 8-16 hearts per max-HP
